input.user_input: Change the arbitration provision to require AAA rules instead of JAMS. Also change the seat of arbitration from San Francisco to Chicago.

actual: Please upload the document you would like me to modify. Once you provide it, I can update the arbitration provision to require AAA rules and change the seat of arbitration to Chicago.
